languages.text: {n}Воздев руку, техножрец резко схлопывает ладонь, и разряды Движущей Силы угасают, словно он поймал их в кулак. Грузный мужчина с металлическим животом и громоздким панцирем парит над полом, напоминая огромного алого жука. Из под угловатой черной шапки выглядывает немолодое лицо, сохранившее поразительно много органики для служителя {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g}. Его, подобно бороде, обрамляют кабели и пистоны.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Воздев руку, техножрец резко схлопывает ладонь, и разряды машинной искры угасают, словно он поймал их в кулак. Грузный мужчина с металлическим животом и громоздким панцирем парит над полом, напоминая огромного алого жука. Из под угловатой черной шапки выглядывает немолодое лицо, сохранившее поразительно много органики для служителя {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g}. Его, подобно бороде, обрамляют кабели и пистоны.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Raising his hand, the Tech-Priest snaps his hand closed and the sparks of the Motive Force vanish, almost as if he has caught them in his fist. A corpulent man with a metal abdomen and bulky carapace, he hovers above the deck like a large, crimson beetle. A mature face sits beneath an angular black cap; for a servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}, his visage retains a surprising proportion of organic material, and it is set in a dense beard of cables and pistons.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Воздев руку, техножрец резко схлопывает ладонь, и разряды Движущей Силы угасают, словно он поймал их в кулак. Грузный мужчина с металлическим животом и громоздким панцирем парит над полом, напоминая огромного алого жука. Из под угловатой черной шапки выглядывает немолодое лицо, сохранившее поразительно много органики для служителя {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g}. Его, подобно бороде, обрамляют кабели и пистоны.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}With hand upraised, the Tech-Priest sharply curls his fingers into a fist, and the charges of the Motive Force wink out, almost as if he caught them in his hand. A corpulent man with a metal abdomen and bulky carapace, he hovers above the deck like a large, crimson beetle. A mature face sits beneath an angular black cap; for a servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}, his visage retains a surprising proportion of organic material, and it is set in a dense beard of cables and pistons.{/n}

languages.text: {n}手は高く掲げ、テクプリストは鋭く指を拳に握り込む。機械のスパークが拳に捕らえられたかのように消える。金属腹と厚い甲殻を持つ肥満の男は、大きな赤い甲虫のように甲板の上を浮遊している。角ばった黒い帽子の下には熟練した顔があり、機械神官の部下にしては、驚くほど有機的な顔を残している。顔はケーブルとピストンでできた濃い髭で覆われている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With hand upraised, the Tech-Priest sharply curls his fingers into a fist, and the charges of machine spark wink out, almost as if he caught them in his hand. A corpulent man with a metal abdomen and bulky carapace, he hovers above the deck like a large, crimson beetle. A mature face sits beneath an angular black cap; for a servant of the Adeptus Mechanicus, his visage retains a surprising proportion of organic material, and it is set in a dense beard of cables and pistons.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Tech-Priest hebt seine Hand, und als er sie schließt, verschwinden die Funken der Antriebskraft, als hätte er sie in seiner Faust gefangen. Der korpulente Mann mit dem metallenen Oberkörper und dem wuchtigen Panzer schwebt über dem Deck wie ein großer, purpurner Käfer. Er hat ein reifes Gesicht und trägt eine steife schwarze Kappe. Für einen Diener des {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} hat sein Gesicht einen erstaunlich hohen organischen Anteil und wird von einem dichten Bart aus Kabeln und Kolben eingerahmt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Raising his hand, the Tech-Priest snaps his hand closed and the sparks of the Motive Force vanish, almost as if he has caught them in his fist. A corpulent man with a metal abdomen and bulky carapace, he hovers above the deck like a large, crimson beetle. A mature face sits beneath an angular black cap; for a servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}, his visage retains a surprising proportion of organic material, and it is set in a dense beard of cables and pistons.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Tech-Priest hebt seine Hand, und als er sie schließt, verschwinden die Funken der Antriebskraft, als hätte er sie in seiner Faust gefangen. Der korpulente Mann mit dem metallenen Oberkörper und dem wuchtigen Panzer schwebt über dem Deck wie ein großer, purpurner Käfer. Er hat ein reifes Gesicht und trägt eine steife schwarze Kappe. Für einen Diener des {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} hat sein Gesicht einen erstaunlich hohen organischen Anteil und wird von einem dichten Bart aus Kabeln und Kolben eingerahmt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El tecnosacerdote levanta la mano, la cierra bruscamente y las chispas de Fuerza Motriz se esfuman como si las hubiese atrapado con la mano. Es un hombre corpulento, con el abdomen metalizado y un voluminoso caparazón, que se desplaza flotando sobre cubierta como un escarabajo carmesí de grandes dimensiones. Bajo su negra y angulosa gorra asoma un rostro maduro; para tratarse de un siervo del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}, su semblante aún conserva una inusitada proporción de materia orgánica cercada por una tupida barba de cables y pistones.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Raising his hand, the Tech-Priest snaps his hand closed and the sparks of the Motive Force vanish, almost as if he has caught them in his fist. A corpulent man with a metal abdomen and bulky carapace, he hovers above the deck like a large, crimson beetle. A mature face sits beneath an angular black cap; for a servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}, his visage retains a surprising proportion of organic material, and it is set in a dense beard of cables and pistons.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El tecnosacerdote levanta la mano, la cierra bruscamente y las chispas de Fuerza Motriz se esfuman como si las hubiese atrapado con la mano. Es un hombre corpulento, con el abdomen metalizado y un voluminoso caparazón, que se desplaza flotando sobre cubierta como un escarabajo carmesí de grandes dimensiones. Bajo su negra y angulosa gorra asoma un rostro maduro; para tratarse de un siervo del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}, su semblante aún conserva una inusitada proporción de materia orgánica cercada por una tupida barba de cables y pistones.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Elini kaldıran Tekno Rahip, avcunu şıklatarak kapatıyor. Devinim Gücü'nün kıvılcımları, sanki onları yumruğunda yakalamış gibi sönüyor. Metal bir karına ve hantal bir kabuğa sahip şişman bir adam, güvertenin üzerinde büyük, kızıl bir böcek gibi süzülüyor. Köşeli siyah başlığının altında olgun bir surat olduğu görülüyor. Bir {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} hizmetkârı için yüzü, şaşırtıcı oranda organik materyal barındırıyor ve kablolarla pistonlardan oluşan yoğun bir sakalın içine oturtulmuş.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Raising his hand, the Tech-Priest snaps his hand closed and the sparks of the Motive Force vanish, almost as if he has caught them in his fist. A mature face sits beneath an angular black cap; for a servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}, his visage retains a surprising proportion of organic material, and it is set in a dense beard of cables and pistons.{/n}

Metal bir karına ve hantal bir kabuğa sahip şişman bir adam, güvertenin üzerinde büyük, kızıl bir böcek gibi süzülüyor. Köşeli siyah başlığının altında olgun bir surat olduğu görülüyor. Bir {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} hizmetkârı için yüzü, şaşırtıcı oranda organik materyal barındırıyor ve kablolarla pistonlardan oluşan yoğun bir sakalın içine oturtulmuş.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Levant la main, le technoprêtre serre le poing, et soudain, comme s'il les avait capturées dans le creux de sa paume, les étincelles de la Force Motrice disparaissent. Malgré sa corpulence, son abdomen métallique et sa carapace volumineuse, il plane au-dessus du pont tel un scarabée écarlate. Sous un couvre-chef anguleux se cachent des traits parcheminés. Pour un serviteur de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}, son visage reste majoritairement composé de matière organique, bien qu'encadré d'une barbe dense de câbles et de pistons.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Raising his hand, the Tech-Priest snaps his hand closed and the sparks of the Motive Force vanish, almost as if he has caught them in his fist. A corpulent man with a metal abdomen and bulky carapace, he hovers above the deck like a large, crimson beetle. A mature face sits beneath an angular black cap; for a servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}, his visage retains a surprising proportion of organic material, and it is set in a dense beard of cables and pistons.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Levant la main, le technoprêtre serre le poing, et soudain, comme s'il les avait capturées dans le creux de sa paume, les étincelles de la Force Motrice disparaissent. Malgré sa corpulence, son abdomen métallique et sa carapace volumineuse, il plane au-dessus du pont tel un scarabée écarlate. Sous un couvre-chef anguleux se cachent des traits parcheminés. Pour un serviteur de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}, son visage reste majoritairement composé de matière organique, bien qu'encadré d'une barbe dense de câbles et de pistons.{/n}

languages.text: {n}技术神甫抬起手，猛然握紧，源力的火花随之熄灭，仿佛被他攥入手心。他身躯肥胖，腹部覆有金属，背甲厚重，宛如一只猩红甲虫悬浮于甲板之上。棱角方正的黑色帽檐下是一张成熟的面孔；作为一名{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}机械修会{/g}仆从，他的脸上竟保留了大量血肉组织，而这些组织深深植入密集的电缆与活塞构成的胡须之中。{/n}
